input.script: Ever wonder how a McDonald's hamburger comes to life? Our journey begins as fresh ingredients arrive, ready for their transformation. Watch closely as the perfectly seasoned beef patties are grilled to perfection, sizzling with flavor. Then, the soft, toasted buns glide along the line, awaiting their destiny. Crisp lettuce, tangy pickles, and savory onions are added with incredible precision. A dollop of signature sauce, a slice of melty cheese, and suddenly, it's more than just ingredients. It's a symphony of flavors, assembled with speed and care. From the factory floor to your hands, every McDonald's hamburger is a testament to efficiency and taste, crafted for millions around the world.

visionDocument.core_concept: A high-energy, immersive journey through McDonald's hamburger factory, from the food's perspective.
visionDocument.color_philosophy: Bright, clean, and vibrant colors emphasizing freshness and industrial efficiency, with warm tones for the final product.

userContext.originalPrompt: Create a 1 minute long video 'How McDonald's Hamburgers Are Made in a Factory' make this video from the pov of the food assembly line, like the camera is put near the line where the burger is being made.

promptsOutput: 1: POV shot, clean modern food factory corridor, stainless steel machinery, bright even industrial lighting, low-angle tracking shot with leading lines, deep f/8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking forward along corridor, 16:9 8K

2: POV shot, overhead conveyor belt, vegetable crates descending into view, modern food factory, stainless steel machinery, bright clean industrial lighting, medium shot, centered composition, push in movement, medium f/5.6 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking down at conveyor, 16:9 8K

3: Extreme close-up, perfectly seasoned beef patty sizzling on a clean grill surface, intense heat, warm highlights on patty, low-angle static shot, centered composition, shallow f/1.8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at grill surface, 16:9 8K

4: POV shot, soft toasted bun gliding along a clean conveyor line, steam rising around edges, modern food factory, soft diffused industrial lighting, close-up tracking shot, rule-of-thirds composition, shallow f/2.8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking forward along conveyor, 16:9 8K

5: POV shot, high-speed overhead view, crisp lettuce, tangy pickles, savory onions cascading downward onto a clean surface, modern food factory, bright clean industrial lighting, medium close-up, dynamic composition, pan down movement, medium f/4 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking down at ingredients, 16:9 8K

6: Extreme close-up, signature sauce nozzle depositing a precise spiral onto a clean surface, melty cheese visible, modern food factory, focused spotlight on sauce, eye-level static shot, centered composition, shallow f/2.8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at sauce application, 16:9 8K

7: Medium close-up, fully assembled hamburger rotating 360 degrees under bright assembly lights, modern food factory, soft key and warm fill lighting, eye-level 360-degree rotation, centered composition, medium f/4 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at assembled burger, 16:9 8K

8: POV shot, packaging machinery in a clean modern food factory, stainless steel, bright even industrial lighting, low-angle tracking shot with leading lines, deep f/8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking along assembly line, 16:9 8K

9: POV shot, burger moving towards packaging, clean modern food factory, stainless steel machinery, bright clean industrial lighting, medium shot, centered composition, push in movement, medium f/5.6 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking towards packaging, 16:9 8K

10: POV shot, grid pattern of identical hamburgers extending to the horizon, clean modern food factory, bright uniform lighting, high-angle pull out shot, grid pattern composition, deep f/11 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at endless burgers, 16:9 8K

11: Medium shot, golden arches logo, warm inviting lighting, eye-level slow zoom out, centered composition, medium f/4 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at logo, 16:9 8K

12: Close-up, fully assembled hamburger, soft even lighting, eye-level static shot, centered composition, shallow f/2.8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at burger, 16:9 8K

13: Black screen, minimalist, dark lighting, full screen static shot, centered composition, deep f/8 focus, cinematic, high-definition, industrial photography, clean aesthetic, looking at screen, 16:9 8K
